features.title: Add README Sync to releaser
features.description: Add a README Sync section to the releaser role file that instructs the releaser to verify and update README.md during every release. The section covers version references, directory layout diagrams, and skill/profile tables. Positioned after Manifest Synchronization and before Version Bump Rules.
steps: Verify plugins/harness/skills/harness/roles/releaser.md contains a README Sync section
Verify the README Sync section is positioned after Manifest Synchronization and before Version Bump Rules

Verify the section includes sub-steps for reading README.md, checking version references, verifying directory layout, verifying skill/profile tables, updating stale factual content, and staging README.md
Verify the instructions prohibit prose rewriting and only allow factual content updates
Verify skill discovery uses glob patterns, not hardcoded skill names
Verify plugins/harness/agents/releaser.md still delegates to the role file and needs no changes
Verify the total addition is approximately 10-15 lines of Markdown
evidence: 01-evaluation.json: all contract checks pass, feature_evidence confirms passes: true
features.notes: Completed in sprint 1. All contract checks passed.

features.title: Fix Codex evaluation detection and review integration
features.description: Fix the evaluator Codex detection pre-flight which always falls back to Claude-only review. Update detection logic in advanced.md to check 3 sources with any-one-passes semantics. Replace raw codex CLI call with /codex:adversarial-review plugin skill. Update evaluator.md condensed decision tree to match.
features.source_requirement: user request: codex evaluation always not working
steps: Verify advanced.md Step 2 (auto mode) checks 3 sources: project enabledPlugins, global extraKnownMarketplaces, CLI on PATH
Verify advanced.md Step 2 uses any-one-passes semantics
Verify advanced.md Step 3 uses /codex:adversarial-review --wait as primary method with raw CLI fallback
Verify advanced.md Step 3 includes severity-to-BLOCKING/NON-BLOCKING mapping
Verify advanced.md Step 4 includes detection_method field
Verify evaluator.md Read list references both project and global settings files
Verify evaluator.md Section 0 auto mode matches the 3-check procedure
Verify evaluator.md Section 0 references /codex:adversarial-review as review method
